news.title: "Vamos chegar aos 100 anos": este restaurante de Lisboa é testemunha da história no Bairro Alto - SIC Notícias
news.summary:
# Summary

A historic restaurant in Lisbon's Bairro Alto neighborhood is approaching its 100th anniversary and serves as a cultural witness to the area's evolution over the decades. The establishment has maintained its traditional character while adapting to modern times, making it a significant landmark in one of the city's most iconic districts. Visitors to Lisbon would appreciate dining at this venerable spot for its authentic atmosphere, historical significance, and deep roots in Portuguese culinary and social heritage.
